final:
module RefModule(
input wire clk,
input wire [3:0] num_a,
input wire [3:0] num_b,
input wire ctrl,
output reg [3:0] out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
	if(ctrl == 0) begin
		out <= num_a + num_b;
	end
	else begin
		out <= num_a - num_b;
	end
end

endmodule
